name: list_hierarchical_cells
short_description: Returns the hierarchical paths of instances for the named reference.
full_help:
list_hierarchical_cells

Description: 
Returns the hierarchical paths of instances for the named reference.

Syntax: 
list_hierarchical_cells  [-fileset <arg>] [-top_only] [-quiet] [-verbose]
                         [<reference_name>]

Returns: 
list of hierarchical paths

Usage: 
  Name                Description
  -------------------------------
  [-fileset]          Specifies the fileset to operate on
  [-top_only]         Only walk and list the hierarchy associated with the 
                      active top
  [-quiet]            Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]          Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<reference_name>]  Specifies the name of the module/entity

Categories: 
Project

arguments.description: Specifies the fileset to operate on
